scope_note: QA Witt Tower EEG Seizure Orbit Discriminator cert [446]. Empirical cert applying the Witt tower three-tier orbit partition (MOD=27, T0=bins 0-8 Singularity neighborhood, T1=bins 9-17 Satellite neighborhood, T2=bins 18-26 Cosmos neighborhood) to scalp EEG recorded during an epileptic seizure. Data: Siena Scalp EEG Database, patient PN01, recording PN01-1.edf (Detti et al. 2020 doi:10.13026/s9f6-9n95); 8 EEG channels, 512 Hz, partial reads via pyedflib. Multi-channel energy RMS per 5-second window; seizure annotation: interictal=9218-10218s (1000s pre-ictal baseline), ictal=10218-10272s (54s, 10 windows), post-ictal=10272-10372s (100s, 19 windows). Rank-normalized to Z/27Z. CERTIFIED FACTS: (C1) 199 interictal + 10 ictal + 19 post-ictal windows PASS. (C2) ALL 29 seizure-phase windows (ictal+post) excluded from T0; hypergeometric log10_p=-5.5 PASS. (C3) ALL 29/29 seizure-phase windows in T2; hypergeometric log10_p=-15.7 PASS. (C4) Mean tier strictly increases: interictal=0.854 < seizure-phase=2.000 PASS. (C5) Seizure-phase tier set = {T2} disjoint from T0 presence in interictal; ictal+post both 0% T0 PASS. (C6) Witt v_3 valuation above uniform null (null=0.481) for interictal consecutive-pair stream PASS. ORBIT TRANSITION: interictal spread across all tiers (T0=38%, T1=39%, T2=24%); ictal 100% T2; post-ictal 100% T2. QA prediction: ictal neural dynamics (maximal energy, synchronized chaos) = Cosmos orbit; interictal (constrained resting dynamics) = distributed across tiers, suppressed from high-energy T2. Theorem NT: EEG voltage is observer projection; rank bins are QA integer state. 6 checks PASS; 8/8 fixtures PASS. PRIMARY SOURCES: Detti et al. (2020) Siena Scalp EEG Database, PhysioNet doi:10.13026/s9f6-9n95; Wall (1960) doi:10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541 (Witt tower theory). Structural parent: cert [110]. Empirical chain extends certs [442]-[445]. Validated 2026-06-18.
